title: Speaking – Part 3: Collaborative Task
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.centralQuestion: What are the benefits and drawbacks of different workspaces in promoting creativity in a business setting?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which TWO options would be most effective for fostering innovation.
options: Coworking spaces shared by multiple companies

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes.
Here are some options about different workspaces. [Shows task card]
First, discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each option. Then decide which two would be most effective for fostering innovation. You have about two minutes.
Now decide together which two options would be most effective for fostering innovation.
